category_sources: Official GitHub README identifies it as a vscode-langservers binary collection.
source_facts.description says the package provides language servers for HTML, CSS, JavaScript, and JSON extracted from VS Code.
display_name_sources: source_facts.homepage points to the official hrsh7th/vscode-langservers-extracted repository.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README is the project documentation surface.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; source_facts.homepage is the official GitHub repository URL.
tags_sources: source_facts.description lists the extracted VS Code language servers.
source_facts.executables lists CSS, ESLint, HTML, JSON, and Markdown language-server binaries.
